title: Main application source files missing from archive
evidence: src/main/java/ does not exist; only src/test/java/com/example/BookApiTest.java is present. Test references App.start() at BookApiTest.java:34 and new BookDao() at BookApiTest.java:32, confirming main classes existed at build time.
suggestion: Re-archive the run workspace to include src/main source files; without them code review and rebuild are impossible

title: Author-required validation not tested (title validation confirmed)
evidence: BookApiTest.java:79 tests POST /books with {"author":"X"} (missing title) and asserts 400, but no test sends {"title":"X"} (missing author). Main source unavailable to verify author validation independently.
suggestion: Add a test for POST /books with title but no author to confirm both required fields are validated

title: Test count exceeds minimum requirement (6 vs 3 required)
evidence: BookApiTest.java contains 6 @Test methods: health, createBook, createValidationFails, getById, listAndFilter, updateAndDelete — double the R12 minimum of 3
